\documentclass[14pt]{extarticle}

\usepackage{polyglossia}
\setdefaultlanguage{english}
\setotherlanguage{hebrew}

% Custom page numbering to yield half-title.a, half-title.b, etc.
\renewcommand{\thepage}{half-title.\alph{page}}

\newcommand{\blockA}{%
  MISHKAN T'FILAH%
}

\newcommand{\blockB}{%
  משכן תפלה%
}
